title: Civil War I (miniquest)

startPoint.en: Speak to Adrasteia in the Falador Castle throne room.
startPoint.es: Habla con Adrasteia en la sala del trono del Falador Castle.

kills: 144 demons in the Wilderness as part of the Gross Misconduct achievement (can be done prior to starting the miniquest)

text.en: Talk to Adrasteia (2nd floor of the White Knights' Castle's eastern side).
text.es: Habla con Adrasteia (en el lado este del White Knights' Castle).

text.en: Talk to Anne Dimitri (just north of Quercus in the Wilderness).
text.es: Habla con Anne Dimitri (justo al norte de Quercus, en el Wilderness).

text.en: Kill 144 demons in the Wilderness for the Gross Misconduct achievement if not already completed.
text.es: Mata a 144 demonios en el Wilderness para conseguir el logro Gross Misconduct, si aún no lo has completado.

text.en: Talk to Anne Dimitri. (This is done automatically if you already had Gross Misconduct completed.)
text.es: Habla con Anne Dimitri. (Esto se hace automáticamente si ya tenías completado Gross Misconduct).
